text: As I stand here, my mind is stirred by contrasts. The clean glass walls of an empty meeting room evoke a sense of potentiality—plans yet to unfold, conversations still to be had. Walking further, bold colors and words on the wall about research and development ignite my curiosity and excitement. I feel on the threshold of innovation, yet enveloped by silence. My surroundings remind me of the ever-present dance between anticipation and possibility.
